C1.1.description: 硬路由比软教师混合在 MSE 下平均提升 15.2%

evidence.quote_text: With MSE, hard routing improves the average over soft mixing by 15.2%, with gains on subject addition, background change, style change, color alteration, and subject removal. The largest gains appear on background change and subject removal, where hard routing improves by 20.8% and 26.8%, respectively.

C1.2.description: 低噪声查询比中噪声提升 23.7%，比高噪声提升 19.5%

evidence.quote_text: At 2k steps, low-tt querying improves the GEditBench average over median-tt and high-tt querying by 23.7% and 19.5%.

C1.3.description: 单查询 (K=1) 优于所有密集查询变体 (K=2,4,8,16)

evidence.quote_text: The single-query default outperforms the weighted dense-query variants across K=2,4,8,16, improving the GEditBench average by 16.6%, 7.9%, 10.2%, and 12.2%, respectively.

C1.4.description: Plain velocity MSE 是最稳定且表现最好的目标函数

evidence.quote_text: Plain velocity MSE gives the strongest average among the tested local matching objectives. It improves over timestep-weighted MSE and DMD-EMA hybrid by 2.8%, over consistency matching by 4.1%, and over KL-σ̄² matching by 4.5%.

C2.1.description: DanceOPD 在现实主义吸收中关闭 85.3% 的学生-教师差距

evidence.quote_text: DanceOPD improves the realism reward over off-policy distillation by 9.9% and closes 85.3% of the student-to-teacher reward gap.

C2.2.description: DanceOPD 在 T2I+Edit 上超越所有基线方法约 18%

C2.3.description: 局部编辑 SFT 初始化是最佳初始化选择

evidence.quote_text: At 2k steps, local edit initialization improves the GEditBench average over merged initialization by 37.2%, over global edit initialization by 112.8%, and over T2I initialization by 204.4%.

C3.1.description: SDE 去相关恢复密集查询压力测试中 18.4% 的性能

evidence.quote_text: In the K=2, G=3 stress case, replacing ODE rollout with SDE rollout improves the average by 18.4%. The recovery is strongest on subject removal and subject addition, which improve by 62.0% and 29.0%.

C3.2.description: 16 步训练 rollout 在 2000 步时达到最佳 GEditBench

evidence.quote_text: At 2k steps, the 16-step rollout gives the strongest GEditBench average, improving over the 8-step, 20-step, and 28-step variants by 0.2%, 3.0%, and 0.9%, respectively.

C3.3.description: 有效 CFG ≈ αβ，过度组合导致性能下降 31.2%

evidence.quote_text: The best measured composition improves the GEditBench average over train-only absorption by 7.6% and over eval-only CFG by 1.4%. ... excessive composition of absorbed and external guidance reduces the score by 31.2% relative to the best measured composition.

C4.1.description: 同一步累积多个能力场导致性能下降 4.6%-22.8%

evidence.quote_text: Compared with the single-query step-alternation default, same-step accumulation with K=1 and G=3 loses 4.6% on average. ... K=2, G=3 case loses 22.8% on average, with subject addition and subject removal dropping by 28.9% and 46.0%.

C4.2.description: DanceOPD 在定性结果中保持一致的高质量编辑

evidence.quote_text: Across these edits, DanceOPD generally preserves the bottle identity, cap shape, upright product composition, and central placement while changing the requested visual factor
Our model applies the magenta and cyan cyberpunk appearance while retaining the main face, pose, hair layout, and portrait composition more consistently than the alternatives.

C5.1.description: DanceOPD 的计算成本介于 Off-Policy 和 DiffusionOPD 之间

evidence.quote_text: off-policy is cheapest but off-distribution, DanceOPD pays the rollout cost but only Kours gradient state, DiffusionOPD pays dense Kdense-state gradients, and Flow-OPD further pays the FlowGRPO micro-batch factor.

C5.2.description: DanceOPD 在 GenEval 上同时提升，说明 T2I 基础能力未退化

C6.1.description: DanceOPD 要求冻结能力源使用兼容的速度场参数化

evidence.quote_text: The current formulation assumes that frozen capability sources expose compatible velocity fields over a shared generative state space.

C6.2.description: 非对称 KL 与 MSE 在速度场匹配子问题中等价

evidence.quote_text: KL-style velocity matching reduces to a weighted MSE form under the same view; we provide the derivation in Appendix Sec. 7.1.

C7.1.description: Off-policy 蒸馏查询固定加噪状态而非学生访问状态

evidence.quote_text: The off-policy reproduction keeps the same hard-routed teacher and MSE loss as DanceOPD, but replaces the student-visited query state with a fixed noising distribution around offline endpoints

C7.2.description: Rollout 步数增加不自动提升性能，因为 Beta 分布在更多候选状态上扩散

evidence.quote_text: Thus, a larger N gives a finer low-tt grid, but the same clean-side Beta mass is spread across more states, so the probability assigned to the single cleanest state decreases.
